Back to RoweOS

Privacy Policy

Last updated: February 23, 2026

Overview

Your Data, Your Control

RoweOS is built by The Rowe Collection, LLC ("we", "us", "our"). We believe your data belongs to you. RoweOS is designed as a private AI platform where your information stays under your control. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.

Data Collection

What We Collect

Account Information

When you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile photo. This is used solely for authentication and identifying your account.

Application Data

Data you create within RoweOS (brands, conversations, documents, goals, inventory, calendar events, and other content) is stored locally in your browser and optionally synced to Firebase Cloud Firestore if you enable cloud sync.

API Keys

AI provider API keys you enter (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google) are stored exclusively in your browser's local storage. They are never transmitted to our servers or stored in our databases.

Social Media Connections

If you connect social media accounts (X/Twitter, Threads, Instagram), we receive OAuth access tokens from those platforms. These tokens are stored in your Firebase account and are used only to post content on your behalf when you explicitly request it. We do not read, scrape, or analyze your social media feeds.

Automations & Pipelines

If you create scheduled workflows or multi-step pipelines, RoweOS stores their configuration (name, schedule, action type, steps, and associated brand) in your browser's local storage and optionally in Firebase if cloud sync is enabled. Execution history and results are stored locally. Automations that involve social posting or AI calls use your own connected accounts and API keys — we do not execute actions on external services without a configuration you created.

Usage Analytics

We track basic API usage metrics (provider, model, token count, estimated cost) locally in your browser to power the Analytics dashboard. This data is not sent to our servers unless you enable cloud sync.

Data Usage

How We Use Your Data

  • To authenticate your identity and maintain your session
  • To sync your application data across devices (when cloud sync is enabled)
  • To post content to social media platforms on your explicit request or via automations you configure
  • To execute scheduled automations and multi-step pipelines you create, using your connected accounts and API keys
  • To provide AI-powered features by routing your prompts to third-party AI providers using your own API keys

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes. We do not use your data to train AI models.

Third Parties

Third-Party Services

ServicePurposeData Shared
Google FirebaseAuthentication & cloud syncAccount info, application data (if sync enabled)
Anthropic (Claude)AI conversationsYour prompts (sent directly from browser using your key)
OpenAI (GPT)AI conversationsYour prompts (sent directly from browser using your key)
Google (Gemini)AI conversations & image generationYour prompts (sent directly from browser using your key)
X/Twitter APISocial media postingPost content & images you choose to publish
Meta (Threads/Instagram)Social media postingPost content & images you choose to publish
VercelHosting & serverless functionsOAuth token exchange (server-side only)

AI provider API calls are made directly from your browser to the provider's servers. Your prompts and conversations pass through our Vercel proxy only when required for CORS or authentication purposes, and are never logged or stored on our servers.

Storage & Security

Data Storage

  • Local Storage: Most data is stored in your browser's localStorage. Clearing your browser data removes it permanently.
  • Cloud Sync (Optional): When enabled, data is stored in Google Firebase Cloud Firestore under your authenticated user account. Data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest (AES-256).
  • Social Tokens: OAuth tokens for connected social accounts are stored in Firestore, associated with your user ID, and used only for authorized posting actions.
Your Rights

Data Deletion & Access

  • View your data: All your data is visible within the RoweOS application at any time.
  • Export your data: You can export conversations, documents, and other content from within the app.
  • Delete local data: Clear your browser's localStorage to remove all locally stored data.
  • Delete cloud data: Disconnect cloud sync in Settings to stop syncing. Contact us to request complete deletion of cloud-stored data.
  • Disconnect social accounts: Revoke social media connections at any time from Settings. This deletes stored tokens immediately.
  • Delete your account: Contact us at the email below to request full account and data deletion.
Social Media

Social Media Integration

When you connect a social media account, RoweOS requests only the minimum permissions needed:

  • X/Twitter: Read and write tweets, read profile information
  • Threads: Read profile, publish content
  • Instagram: Read profile, publish content

Content is only posted when you explicitly click "Post" or when an automation you configured executes. We never post on your behalf without your direct action or pre-configured automation. You can disconnect any social account at any time, which immediately revokes our access.

Children

Children's Privacy

RoweOS is not intended for use by anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child under 13, we will take steps to delete that information.

Updates

Changes to This Policy

We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be reflected by the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Continued use of RoweOS after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

Contact

Contact Us

If you have questions about this privacy policy or want to exercise your data rights, contact us:

The Rowe Collection, LLC

Austin, Texas

Email: jordan@therowecollection.com

Web: roweos.com
